title: rubus tabanimontanus
intro: Rubus tabanimontanus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a type of plant species belonging to the Rubus genus. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Rubus tabanimontanus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its potential benefits.
